LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-20-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LIZHEN CHEN'S RE-NOTICE OF HEARING TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Notice For Continuance Of Hearing On Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Off Calendar

Re-Notice Of Hearing To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. THERESIA SANDHU, Esq. of Law Office of Theresia C. Sandhu (tel: 408-313-1174) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT LIZHEN CHEN's Re-Notice Of Hearing To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion for set aside default and default judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Re-Notice Of Hearing To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
